title: Driver Ch.1: Driving Tests Requirements
description: Learn about the three licensing requirements for Maryland: vision screening, knowledge test, and driving skills test.

title: Driver Ch.2: The Maryland GDL System
description: Understand Maryland's Graduated Driver Licensing system for first-time drivers.

title: Driver Ch.3: Basic Driving
description: Defensive driving, right-of-way rules, speed control, following distance, and lane driving.

title: Driver Ch.4: Speed and Right-of-Way
description: Speed limits, following distances, and right-of-way rules at intersections.

title: Driver Ch.5: Traffic Signs and Signals
description: Understanding traffic signs, signals, and road markings.

title: Driver Ch.6: Parking
description: Parking rules, parallel parking, and parking restrictions.

title: Driver Ch.7: Sharing the Road
description: Sharing the road with pedestrians, bicyclists, and other vehicles.

title: Driver Ch.8: Crashes and Traffic Stops
description: What to do in case of a crash and during traffic stops.

title: Driver Ch.9: Other Restrictions
description: License restrictions, violations, and penalties.

title: Driver Ch.10: Insurance and Safety
description: Insurance requirements and vehicle safety.
